message:
refactor(distributed,net,channel): add Sync bound, update bridge accessors, clean up imports and formatting

Distributed module:
- bridge.rs: reorder imports to place super:: before crate:: per
  convention; collapse duplicate CancelKind::User match arm into the
  wildcard fallback (the explicit "User" => User arm was redundant
  since the _ => User fallback already handled it); update tests to
  use bridge.local().state() accessor instead of bridge.local.state()
  (the field was made private behind an accessor)
- distribution.rs: add Sync supertrait to DistributorTransport — the
  trait is used in Arc<dyn DistributorTransport> contexts for cross-
  thread symbol distribution, so Sync is required for soundness
- recovery.rs: prefix unused format!() result with underscore to
  suppress dead_code warning while retaining the format string for
  documentation value
- tests.rs: update bridge test assertions to use .local() accessor
  and fix deadline comparison to use Time::from_nanos(12345) instead
  of raw .map(|t| t.as_nanos()) chain

Integration tests:
- distributed_snapshot_apply.rs: add module doc comment, remove unused
  RegionMode import, use numeric underscore separator (999_999)
- repro_recovery_high_esi.rs: add module doc comment, use inline
  format arg ({e} instead of separate argument)
- sync_e2e.rs: reformat long block_on().expect() chain

Network/channel formatting:
- net/tcp/socket.rs: reformat Socket::new() call and test assertions
  to stay within line length guidelines
- net/tcp/stream.rs: normalize trailing whitespace
- channel/partition.rs: reformat heal_all() collect chain and add
  drop(partitions) to release Mutex before sorting

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
